brand.name: Simons Fine Art Framing & Gallery
brand.tagline: Custom frames and matting and glass
brand.objection_handle: Clear quotes and honest expectations from the start.

hero.headline: custom framing services in Dublin PA
hero.subtext: We offer custom framing which we hand cut and assemble, and we offer art and framing classes. Prefer to talk? Call us and we'll walk you through the next step. Built with care and attention to detail you can trust.

about.story_text: Simons Fine Art Framing & Gallery stands out as a locally owned artist-driven business that prioritizes affordable, high-quality framing services.
about.founder_note: Built for people who value quality, clarity, and a smooth process.
